market_note: Genuinely thinner-than-ideal but NOT a repeat of 2h-ago: targeted last-7-day searches surfaced FRESH 06-23..06-25 direct-employer roles (Talkiatry, PT Solutions, Solace, OCHIN, Firestone) that are new, not the same inventory. Saved=1 dead, Recommended=mostly Recruiter/HR-Coord/out-of-geo noise, Feed=empty. Real yield came from the two targeted searches. ~3-4 solid GO/borderline-GO + ~4 STRETCH after heavy geo/sponsorship/level filtering.
